name: Chocolate Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Water if dough is dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the oil, sugar, and egg.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients and stir to blend well.
3. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Drop by spoonfuls, about 1 inch apart, onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
5. Bake for about 8 minutes at about 375°F.
